details.productUrlName: Emry Lurker of the Loch Serial Numbered

customAttributes.description:
This spell costs 1 less to cast for each artifact you control.
When Emry, Lurker of the Loch enters the battlefield, mill four cards.
T: Choose target artifact card in your graveyard. You may cast that card this turn. (You still pay its costs. Timing rules still apply.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/21/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
